name: Frankie Valli
abstract: Francesco Stephen Castelluccio (born May 3, 1934), better known by his stage name Frankie Valli, is an American singer and occasional actor, best known as the lead vocalist of the Four Seasons. He is known for his unusually powerful falsetto voice.

concerts.label: Frankie Valli and The Four Seasons

works.t: Can't Take My Eyes Off of You
Any Day Now / Oh Happy Day (Medley)
Don't Think Twice, It's All Right

concerts.label: Frankie Valli & The Four Seasons, with Jay and the Americans

about_quotes.speaker: Charles Calello
about_quotes.evidence: So Frankie wanted me to join The Four Lovers. So I continued – I wanted to continue to go to school so I quit the band I was in and went to work with Frankie Valli and The Four Lovers playing bass.
about_quotes.doc_title: Charles Calello interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, July 21, 2025

about_quotes.speaker: Ronnie Zito
about_quotes.evidence: I remember I did “Swearin’ to God” with Frankie Valli... he sang with us but he didn’t record. He sang in a booth while we recorded
about_quotes.doc_title: Ronnie Zito interviewed by Monk Rowe & Rick Montalbano, via Zoom, March 9, 2022

about_quotes.speaker: Alan Raph
about_quotes.evidence: We were recording Frankie Valli with the Four Seasons... And we were sitting as a band
about_quotes.doc_title: Alan Raph interviewed by Monk Rowe, Danbury, Connecticut, November 20, 2001

about_quotes.speaker: Lou Pallo
about_quotes.evidence: Because we did, if I recall on the Four Seasons recordings Frankie didn’t even sing... and we did a lot of commercials too... Like, “Hi this is Frankie Valli for KTLM in Oklahoma City” and we would be playing in the background
about_quotes.doc_title: Lou Pallo interviewed by Monk Rowe, New York City, New York, January 14, 2007

about_quotes.speaker: Warren Bernhardt
about_quotes.evidence: If it were just a Frankie Valli and the Four Seasons you wouldn’t have any idea what — Charlie Calello was the arranger there and what he’d bring in, it was usually sight unseen. And I was a very good reader.
about_quotes.doc_title: Warren Bernhardt interviewed by Monk Rowe, Bearsville, New York, January 3, 2012

about_quotes.speaker: Joel Dorn
about_quotes.evidence: [INTERVIEWER] ...like Frankie Valli, the Four Seasons records. [INTERVIEWEE] Oh Bob Crewe.
about_quotes.doc_title: Joel Dorn interviewed by Monk Rowe, New York City, New York, January 13, 2007
